<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![ZZ Plant](27-zz-plant.jpg)

The other plant we recommend to travellers. ZZ tolerates dry stretches up to a month, low light, and the occasional move. Glossy leaves that look almost lacquered.

## What's in it

- Zamioculcas zamiifolia
- Care card

## Care

Water when the soil is bone dry — usually every 2–3 weeks. Wipe the leaves monthly.
